_meta.description: C4 Phase 2a â€” sidecar mapping from seam_id -> contract_test path. Read by tools/mine_ai_seams.py to attach a `contract_test:` field to each seam. Validator validate_ai_seam_coverage.py ratchets forward-only on the count of seams without a contract test. Empty today (every contract is unwritten); each new entry pays the gap down by 1.

schema.seam_id: string (matches the catalog's id field exactly: 'saasâ†’ai/<caller>â†’<callee>' etc.)
schema.contract_test: string (path to the Playwright spec or unit test exercising this seam's wire format)
schema.note: string|null (why this test covers this seam)

_meta.policy: A 'contract test' here means a test that pins the WIRE FORMAT between caller and callee (request body shape, response envelope, error codes, hive_id propagation, rate-limit fields). Journey tests that incidentally invoke the seam don't qualify â€” contract tests must FAIL if the format changes silently.
